name: gong
description: Reads Gong users, calls, scorecards, settings, flows, and related public API resources; models Gong mutations as typed reverse-ETL actions.

risk.read: external Gong API read of call, user, CRM, settings, flow, and activity data; direct reads are bounded and redacted
risk.write: typed Gong reverse ETL mutations for calls, meetings, CRM, permissions, flows, engagement, and data privacy erasure
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan, preview, approval, execute; destructive/admin actions require --confirm destructive
